he Global Hydrogen Review 2024 systematically monitors the global hydrogen sector, reporting that demand reached 97 Mt in 2023—mostly supplied by unabated fossil fuels—despite accelerating policy action, growing low-emissions project announcements, and almost USD 100 billion in public funding allocated to support the clean energy transition.
